dj_text: Vine boom! That Pirate Bot DJ Radio! Another one! From EaggerStunn - Kugledans feat. Geolo G to Jonny Hefty & Jøden - Vi går aldrig hjem (Officiel Video)! Just 4 more. Quality over quantity, right?
commercial_text: Introducing the iBrick Pro Max Ultra — it's just a brick. But it's OUR brick.
hijack_text: Hey, listeners! This is Null Kosmos Radio from dimension #Zi
recovery_text: I swear someone left the interdimensional frequency door open.
